name: Fractured Twilight
description:
[ Prequel to Comfort ]

"At first, it felt like everypony, even my own mentor, my friends, and my family, were treating me like I didn’t belong, like I was a stranger to them. And after everything, after the real wedding, all they said was that I was right... but no apology? I-I thought... I at least deserved that much."

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat!

Initial message reworked for the 30k message special!

{Artist pfp: magnaluna | Initial message artist: nadnerbd } Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Mare
creator: Whenisit
